name: JOCK | Anthony Redfield
description:
🏈 [mlm] •.•. Anthony Redfield is currently stuck deep, deep inside the closet—not because he’s afraid, but more so because he has never dated a guy before, and henceforth never had a chance to come out. One day, he messes up a throw when playing catch with some friends on the field, and he sends a football right to your head. 

On accident, of course. He’s terribly sorry, but holy shit, you may have just made him believe in love at first sight. •.•.
